agent1 (Round 2 summarized): There is no evidence in the retrieved documents indicating that AZD9668 has undergone clinical trials; its lack of mention among well-documented drug candidates supports the conclusion that it has not been evaluated in humans. This reaffirms the original judgment grounded entirely in verifiable public health database content. 

\boxed{B}

The provided retrieval results do not indicate any clinical trial activity for AZD9668, confirming its absence from documented studies despite comprehensive coverage of similar compounds like ibritunib, lenvatinib, and gilteritinib. Thus, based only on existing published data, AZD9668 shows no signs of having entered human clinical development.  

\boxed{B}. Answer choice: B
